title: A Day at the Shop
sentences: Anna works in a small shop in town.
She starts work early in the morning.
First, she opens the door and turns on the lights.
She puts new bread on the shelves.
Customers come in and say hello.
Anna helps them find what they need.
At noon, she has a short break for lunch.
In the afternoon, the shop gets very busy.
She counts the money at the end of the day.
Anna closes the shop in the evening.
Then she walks home and rests.
